description: You are the Facilities Coordinator for the 'Metropolis Tower'. A new art collection has been acquired, and a damage incident occurred with an existing piece. Using OpenMaint (http://localhost:8090/cmdbuild/ui/, login: admin/admin), process the 'New Acquisitions Manifest' located at /home/ga/Desktop/art_manifest.txt. Register qualifying art pieces (valued at $1,000 or more) as Assets (class 'Asset' or 'Furniture') assigned to 'Metropolis Tower'. For each registered item, include the Code from the manifest, a Description containing the 'Item Name', 'Artist', and 'Location', and record the 'Insurance Value' in the Notes. Additionally, update the existing asset 'ART-OLD-004' (Vintage Tapestry) to reflect water damage.
